steps.title: Read the slope
steps.content:
Line $k$ is given as $y=\frac{17}{7}x+4$, which is slope-intercept form. The slope is the coefficient of $x$:
$$m_k=\frac{17}{7}$$

steps.title: Use the parallel-line shortcut
steps.content: Parallel lines have the same slope. Since line $j$ is parallel to line $k$, line $j$ also has slope $\frac{17}{7}$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A — $\frac{7}{17}$ is the reciprocal. Choice C — $4$ is the y-intercept, not the slope. Choice D — $17$ uses only the numerator. Choice B — $\frac{17}{7}$ is $\frac{17}{7}$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: The slope of line $j$ is $\frac{17}{7}$, so B is correct.
